name: [BUG-OT-005] TC-OT-013 — PUT /api/v1/token: Must return 405 Method Not Allowed (returns 500)
description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-OT-005]**

**What this test does:**
Sends a PUT request to /api/v1/token (which is a GET-only endpoint) and verifies the server responds with 405 Method Not Allowed.

**Expected:** HTTP 405 Method Not Allowed with an Allow header listing the valid methods
**Actual:** HTTP 500 Internal Server Error

**Root Cause:** The service throws an unhandled exception instead of returning a proper 405 response when it receives an unsupported HTTP method.

**Impact:** API clients that probe method availability or send the wrong method receive a confusing 500 error instead of a clear 405 with the Allow header. This also indicates unhandled exception paths that could mask real server errors.
